name: Ballistakinesis
description: You use The Force to spray an area with dangerous debris.

dcChart.description: Targets take 3d8 damage and suffer -2 to attack rolls until the start of your next turn.

tiers.description: Targets take 3d8 damage and suffer -2 to attack rolls until the start of your next turn.

name: Battle Strike
description: Increases attack and damage for next attack.

name: Blind
description: You hurl dirt, dust, and debris at your foe, affecting its sight.

dcChart.description: Target becomes Flat-Footed and all other creatures gain Concealment from the target.

tiers.description: Target becomes Flat-Footed and all other creatures gain Concealment from the target.

meta.duration: Until the start of your next turn

name: Cloak
description: You bend light around your body, rendering yourself invisible to anyone looking in your direction.

dcChart.description: You are considered to have Total Concealment against all targets until the beginning of your next turn.
Total Concealment and a +2 Force bonus to Stealth until the beginning of your next turn.
Total Concealment and a +3 Force bonus to Stealth until the beginning of your next turn.
Total Concealment and a +5 Force bonus to Stealth until the beginning of your next turn.

tiers.description: You are considered to have Total Concealment against all targets until the beginning of your next turn.

meta.duration: Until beginning of your next turn; maintainable

name: Combustion
description: You use The Force to agitate particles in the air to create a pyrokinetic spray of sparks.

dcChart.description: Targets take 4d6 fire damage and catch on fire.

tiers.description: Targets take 4d6 fire damage and catch on fire.

name: Convection
description: You alter your body chemistry, causing your skin to burn with incredible heat.

dcChart.description: Your unarmed attacks deal +1d6 fire damage and targets catch on fire.
Your unarmed attacks deal +2d6 fire damage and targets catch on fire.
Your unarmed attacks deal +3d6 fire damage and targets catch on fire.
Your unarmed attacks deal +4d6 fire damage and targets catch on fire.

meta.duration: Until the start of your next turn

name: Corruption
description: You use The Force to send a bolt of pure Dark Side vileness into an enemy.

dcChart.description: Target takes 2d6 Force damage and half that again at the start of its turn.
Target takes 3d6 Force damage and half again next round.
Target takes 4d6 Force damage and half again next round.
Target takes 5d6 Force damage and half again next round.

tiers.description: Target takes 2d6 Force damage and half that again at the start of its turn.
Target takes 3d6 Force damage and half again next round.
Target takes 4d6 Force damage and half again next round.
Target takes 5d6 Force damage and half again next round.

name: Crucitorn
description: You ignore the debilitating effects of physical pain, and focus despite great physical trauma.

dcChart.description: Gain +5 Force bonus to Damage Threshold against the triggering attack.
Gain +10 Force bonus to Damage Threshold against the triggering attack.
Gain +15 Force bonus to Damage Threshold against the triggering attack.
Gain +20 Force bonus to Damage Threshold against the triggering attack.

Gain +15 Force bonus to Damage Threshold against the triggering attack.
Gain +20 Force bonus to Damage Threshold against the triggering attack.

name: Cryokinesis
description: You can use The Force to draw heat away from a target, causing its temperature to drop rapidly.

dcChart.description: Reduce the target's Damage Reduction by 5; mechanical or electronic targets also move -1 step on the condition track.
Reduce the target's Damage Reduction by 10; mechanical or electronic targets also move -1 step on the condition track.
Reduce the target's Damage Reduction by 15; mechanical or electronic targets also move -1 step on the condition track.
Reduce the target's Damage Reduction by 20; mechanical or electronic targets also move -1 step on the condition track.

name: Dark Rage
description: Increases Melee attack and damage for 1 turn.

dcChart.description: +2 bonus to melee attack and damage rolls.
+4 bonus to melee attack and damage rolls.
+6 bonus to melee attack and damage rolls.

tiers.description: +2 bonus to melee attack and damage rolls.
+4 bonus to melee attack and damage rolls.
+6 bonus to melee attack and damage rolls.

name: Dark Transfer
description: You use the Dark Side of The Force to restore vitality to a living being.

dcChart.description: Target heals HP equal to your character level.
Target heals twice your character level.
Target heals three times your character level.
Target heals four times your character level.

tiers.description: Target heals HP equal to your character level.
Target heals twice your character level.
Target heals three times your character level.

The object takes 6d6 damage.
The object takes 8d6 damage.
The object takes 10d6 damage.

The object takes 6d6 damage.

dcChart.description: Target takes 2d6 energy damage
Target takes 4d6 energy damage
Target takes 6d6 energy damage and is disabled for 1 round
Target takes 8d6 energy damage and shuts down for 1d4 rounds

tiers.description: Target takes 2d6 energy damage
Target takes 4d6 energy damage
Target takes 6d6 energy damage and is disabled for 1 round
Target takes 8d6 energy damage and shuts down for 1d4 rounds

dcChart.description: Gain Damage Reduction 5 vs energy damage.
Gain Damage Reduction 10 vs energy damage.
Gain Damage Reduction 15 vs energy damage.
Gain Damage Reduction 20 vs energy damage.

description: You reach out to an ally telepathically, sharing visions of the near future.

tiers.description: Target may replace one attack roll, skill check, or Defense with your Use the Force result.

meta.duration: Until start of your next turn

name: Farseeing
description: You use The Force to detect an individual over a long distance.

name: Fear
description: You summon The Dark Side to instill fear in your enemies.

dcChart.description: Target can take only one Standard Action.
Target can take only one Move Action.
Target can take only one Swift Action.
Target cannot take actions on its next turn.

tiers.description: Target can take only one Standard Action.
Target can take only one Move Action.

name: Fold Space
description: You can use The Force to bend space, transporting an object almost instantaneously from one place to another.

dcChart.description: You can move a Medium or smaller object up to 6 squares.
You can move a Large or smaller object up to 12 squares.
You can move a Huge or smaller object up to 18 squares.
You can move a Gargantuan or smaller object up to 24 squares.
You can move a Colossal or smaller object up to 30 squares.

description: You use The Force to create a ball of compressed air and debris that you can hurl at enemy targets.

dcChart.description: The Force Blast deals 2d6 points of damage to the target.
The Force Blast deals 3d6 points of damage to the target.
The Force Blast deals 4d6 points of damage to the target.
The Force Blast deals 5d6 points of damage to the target.

The Force Blast deals 5d6 points of damage to the target.

name: Force Disarm
description: Disarms an opponent using The Force.

name: Force Grip
description: Chokes or crushes an opponent, and may force the opponent to lose their Standard Action.

name: Force Light
description: You can draw The Force into yourself, turning you into a beacon of light that purges the taint of the Dark Side.

dcChart.description: Any creature with a Dark Side Score of 1+, that begins its turn within 6 squares of you, automatically takes 1d6 points of Force damage, and takes a -1 penalty on attack rolls.
Any creature with a Dark Side Score of 1+, that begins its turn within 6 squares of you, automatically takes 2d6 points of Force damage, and takes a -1 penalty on attack rolls.
Any creature with a Dark Side Score of 1+, that begins its turn within 6 squares of you, automatically takes 3d6 points of Force damage, and takes a -1 penalty on attack rolls.
Any creature with a Dark Side Score of 1+, that begins its turn within 6 squares of you, automatically takes 4d6 points of Force damage, and takes a -1 penalty on attack rolls.

Any creature with a Dark Side Score of 1+, that begins its turn within 6 squares of you, automatically takes 4d6 points of Force damage, and takes a -1 penalty on attack rolls.

name: Force Lightning
description: Electrocutes an opponent and deals automatic damage.

dcChart.description: Target takes 2d6 lightning damage
Target takes 4d6 lightning damage
Target takes 6d6 lightning damage and is stunned for 1 round
Target takes 8d6 lightning damage and is stunned for 1d4 rounds

tiers.description: Target takes 2d6 lightning damage
Target takes 4d6 lightning damage

Target takes 8d6 lightning damage and is stunned for 1d4 rounds

dcChart.description: You gain a Shield Rating (SR) of 5 until the beginning of your next turn.
You gain a Shield Rating (SR) of 10 until the beginning of your next turn.
You gain a Shield Rating (SR) of 15 until the beginning of your next turn.

name: Force Slam
description: Pounds multiple opponents, and may knock them prone.

name: Force Storm
description: You can create a storm that draws upon The Dark Side of The Force, focusing its malicious intent on a certain area.

dcChart.description: Create a Force Storm covering a 3x3 square area. Acid rain provides concealment and deals 2d6 acid damage to creatures that enter or begin their turn in the area.
Create a Force Storm covering a 4x4 square area. Acid rain provides concealment and deals 2d6 acid damage to creatures that enter or begin their turn in the area.
Create a Force Storm covering a 5x5 square area. Acid rain provides concealment and deals 2d6 acid damage to creatures that enter or begin their turn in the area.
Create a Force Storm covering a 6x6 square area. Acid rain provides concealment and deals 2d6 acid damage to creatures that enter or begin their turn in the area.

name: Force Storm (FUCG)
description: You use The Force to create a swirling whirlwind of Dark Side energy around yourself.

dcChart.description: The Force Storm manifests for 2 rounds, following your movement.
The Force Storm manifests for 4 rounds, following your movement.
The Force Storm manifests for 6 rounds, following your movement.
The Force Storm manifests for 8 rounds, following your movement.

The Force Storm manifests for 4 rounds, following your movement.
The Force Storm manifests for 6 rounds, following your movement.
The Force Storm manifests for 8 rounds, following your movement.

name: Force Stun
description: Stuns an opponent, and damages their overall condition.

name: Force Thrust
description: You use The Force to push back an opponent several meters, and possibly deal damage.

name: Force Track
description: You peer into The Force for guidance, picking up the trail of your quarry.

name: Force Whirlwind
description: You call upon The Force to surround an enemy in a swirling vortex of Force energy.

dcChart.description: Target takes 1d6 Force damage and is immobilized with -5 penalty to attacks/checks.
Target takes 2d6 Force damage and is immobilized with -5 penalty to attacks/checks.
Target takes 3d6 Force damage and is immobilized with -5 penalty to attacks/checks.
Target takes 4d6 Force damage and is immobilized with -5 penalty to attacks/checks.

name: Hatred

dcChart.description: Any creature that starts its turn within 6 squares of you takes 1d6 Force damage and -1 penalty to all Defenses.
Any creature that starts its turn within 6 squares of you takes 2d6 Force damage and -1 penalty to all Defenses.
Any creature that starts its turn within 6 squares of you takes 3d6 Force damage and -1 penalty to all Defenses.
Any creature that starts its turn within 6 squares of you takes 4d6 Force damage and -1 penalty to all Defenses.

meta.duration: Until end of your next turn

name: Inertia
description: You can use The Force to shift your body's inertia, allowing you to perform impossible stunts.

dcChart.description: You can move up to half your Speed along a wall, ignoring gravity.
You can move up to your full Speed along a wall, ignoring gravity.
You can move up to your full Speed, +2 additional squares, along a wall, ignoring gravity.
You can move up to your full Speed, +4 additional squares, along a wall, ignoring gravity.

You can move up to your full Speed along a wall, ignoring gravity.
You can move up to your full Speed, +2 additional squares, along a wall, ignoring gravity.
You can move up to your full Speed, +4 additional squares, along a wall, ignoring gravity.

name: Inspire
description: You fill your allies with hope and courage, allowing them to face even the most daunting of odds.

name: Intercept
description: You use The Force to telekinetically hurl a small object in the path of an incoming projectile, preventing it from striking you.

dcChart.description: If your Use the Force check equals or exceeds the attack roll result, you negate the attack against you.

tiers.description: If your Use the Force check equals or exceeds the attack roll result, you negate the attack against you.

name: Ionize
description: You call upon The Force to overload electrical systems and Droids, damaging or even destroying the unit.

The target takes 5d6 points of Ion damage.
The target takes 6d6 points of Ion damage.

tiers.description: The target takes 4d6 points of Ion damage.
The target takes 5d6 points of Ion damage.

name: Kinetic Combat
description: You use The Force to manipulate your chosen weapon, allowing it to operate independent of your grasp.

dcChart.description: You can telekinetically move a one-handed melee weapon up to 12 squares away and make an attack with it using Charisma modifier.

tiers.description: You can telekinetically move a one-handed melee weapon up to 12 squares away and make an attack with it using Charisma modifier.

meta.sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide

name: Levitate
description: You can float up or down without anything or anyone to assist you.

dcChart.description: You gain a Fly Speed of 2 squares but can only move vertically.
You gain a Fly Speed of 4 squares but can only move vertically.
You gain a Fly Speed of 6 squares but can only move vertically.

tiers.description: You gain a Fly Speed of 2 squares but can only move vertically.

dcChart.description: Target takes 3d6 Force damage and moves -1 step along the Condition Track.

tiers.description: Target takes 3d6 Force damage and moves -1 step along the Condition Track.

name: Malacia
description: You create dizziness and nausea by disrupting your target's equilibrium.

name: Memory Walk
description: You torment an enemy by causing them to relive their most horrible memories.

dcChart.description: Target takes 2d6 Force damage and loses its Swift Action on its next turn.
Target takes 2d6 Force damage and loses its Move Action on its next turn.
Target takes 2d6 Force damage and loses its Standard Action on its next turn.
Target takes 2d6 Force damage and loses both Standard and Swift Actions on its next turn.

tiers.description: Target takes 2d6 Force damage and loses its Swift Action on its next turn.
Target takes 2d6 Force damage and loses its Move Action on its next turn.
Target takes 2d6 Force damage and loses its Standard Action on its next turn.

name: Mind Shard
description: You use The Force to splinter the mind of an opponent, wracking it with pain.

dcChart.description: Target takes 2d8 Force damage and moves -1 step down the Condition Track.
Target takes 3d8 Force damage and moves -1 step down the Condition Track.
Target takes 4d8 Force damage and moves -1 step down the Condition Track.
Target takes 5d8 Force damage and moves -1 step down the Condition Track.

dcChart.description: Target moves -1 step down the Condition Track.

tiers.description: Target moves -1 step down the Condition Track.

Move objects up to Large size or 250 kg
Move objects up to Huge size or 1 metric ton
Move objects up to Gargantuan size or 5 metric tons
Move objects up to Colossal size or 20 metric tons (starfighter-sized)

tiers.description: Target takes a -5 penalty on the attack roll.

name: Phase

You gain a Phasing Speed of 6 squares.
You gain a Phasing Speed of 8 squares.

description: You reach out with The Force to entreat the aid of plants, causing them to lash out at your opponents.

dcChart.description: Target's Speed is reduced to 0 until the start of your next turn.

tiers.description: Target's Speed is reduced to 0 until the start of your next turn.

name: Prescience
description: The Force grants you a flash of insight in dealing with your enemies.

dcChart.description: You gain a +1 insight bonus to all Defenses and attack rolls against the target.

You gain a +3 insight bonus to all Defenses and attack rolls against the target.

name: Rebuke

dcChart.description: Target takes 3d6 points of damage.

tiers.description: Target takes 3d6 points of damage.

name: Repulse
description: You use The Force to clear an area around yourself.

dcChart.description: Push target back 1 square plus 1 additional square for every 5 points by which you exceeded the target's Strength check.

tiers.description: Push target back 1 square plus 1 additional square for every 5 points by which you exceeded the target's Strength check.

name: Resist Force

You gain +3 to one Defense score of your choice against Force Powers.

tiers.description: You gain +1 to one Defense score of your choice against Force Powers.
You gain +2 to one Defense score of your choice against Force Powers.

name: Sever Force
description: You temporarily block a Force-user's access to The Force.

name: Shatterpoint

dcChart.description: If your next attack hits, treat the target's Damage Threshold as 5 points lower than normal.
If your next attack hits, treat the target's Damage Threshold as 10 points lower than normal.
If your next attack hits, treat the target's Damage Threshold as 15 points lower than normal.

Target's Speed is reduced by 2 squares until the beginning of your next turn.
Target's Speed is reduced by 3 squares until the beginning of your next turn.
Target's Speed is reduced by 4 squares until the beginning of your next turn.

name: Surge

tiers.description: You discover one piece of information contained within the target's memory.

tiers.description: Target takes 2d6 Force damage and loses its Swift Action on its next turn.

name: Valor

The target gains a +2 bonus to their Will Defense against Mind-Affecting and Fear effects.
The target gains a +5 bonus to their Will Defense against Mind-Affecting and Fear effects.
The target gains a +10 bonus to their Will Defense against Mind-Affecting and Fear effects.

name: Vital Transfer

dcChart.description: Target heals 2d6 hit points
Target heals 4d6 hit points
Target heals 6d6 hit points and removes one ongoing condition
Target heals 8d6 hit points and removes all ongoing conditions

tiers.description: Target heals 2d6 hit points
